# Paste 10 real Google Maps URLs here before running Phase 1 validation.
# Use one URL per line. Lines beginning with # are ignored by manual scripts.
#
# Validation mix from plan.md Phase 1:
# - 3 restaurants with likely complete fields
# - 3 service businesses such as clinic, salon, or gym
# - 2 B2B or office listings likely to have a website
# - 1 listing with no website
# - 1 short link such as https://maps.app.goo.gl/...
